name: pict-section-modal-example-panel-garden
description: Panel Garden — visual test-bed for the shell()/addPanel() collapse-tab geometry: all four sides × multiple thicknesses × middle/corner tab positions × theme switching.

scripts.start: echo 'open dist/index.html after npm run build'
scripts.build: npx quack build && npx quack copy

author: steven velozo <steven@velozo.com>

ExampleApplication.Title: Panel Garden
ExampleApplication.Summary: Visual test-bed for the shell()/addPanel() collapse-tab geometry — every side, multiple thicknesses, corner vs middle anchoring, with live theme switching.
